de.title: Rechnung (Belgien, BTW / TVA)
de.description: Belgische Rechnung im Xentral-Original-Stil (schwarz auf weiß) mit BTW/TVA-Nummer, RPR/RPM-Verweis und optionaler Peppol-ID. Reverse-Charge- und innergemeinschaftliche Pflichthinweise, Aussteller-Fiscal-Footer.

en.title: Invoice (Belgium, BTW / TVA)
en.description: Belgian invoice in the Xentral-Original clean style (black on white, no colour fills) with the fiscal fields the BTW / TVA regime expects — BE0XXX.XXX.XXX VAT number for seller and buyer, optional RPR/RPM register reference, optional Peppol participant ID. DIN-5008 layout, fiscal IDs in the info block, reverse-charge / intra-community legal notes, seller fiscal footer. Renders from the standard V3 invoices payload. Languages: Dutch, French, German, English.

constraints: html lang attribute MUST be set on <html>
VAT number MUST be displayed for seller AND buyer (B2B)
VAT format MUST follow `BE0XXX.XXX.XXX` (10 digits, leading 0)
Reverse-charge / intra-community delivery MUST surface as a visible legal note when the flag is set
amounts MUST use tabular-nums and right-align

nl.reverse_charge_note: BTW verlegd — afnemer is BTW-plichtig (artikel 51, §2 W.BTW).
nl.intracom_note: Intracommunautaire levering, vrijgesteld van BTW (artikel 39bis W.BTW).

fr.reverse_charge_note: Autoliquidation — TVA due par le preneur (article 51, §2 du Code TVA).
fr.intracom_note: Livraison intracommunautaire exonérée de TVA (article 39bis Code TVA).

de.reverse_charge_note: Steuerschuldumkehr — Empfänger schuldet die MwSt (Art. 51 §2 BTW-Gesetzbuch).

en.reverse_charge_note: Reverse charge — VAT payable by the recipient (article 51 §2 of the Belgian VAT Code).
en.intracom_note: Intra-community supply, exempt from VAT (article 39bis of the Belgian VAT Code).
